Description: The question text displayed to the player
Example: Which planet is closest to the Sun?

Validation: Exactly 4 items; all non-empty; all unique within array

Description: Zero-based index of correct answer in options array
Validation: Integer 0-3; must be valid index into options

Description: Educational text explaining why the answer is correct
Example: Mercury orbits at 57.9 million km from the Sun, making it the closest planet.
Validation: Non-empty if provided; 10-500 characters; should teach not just confirm
Lowercase; letters and hyphens only; must match defined category list

Description: Difficulty level for filtering and scoring
Validation: One of: easy, medium, hard, masters

Description: Cross-cutting topic labels for search and filtering
Validation: Array of lowercase strings; max 5 tags
Non-empty if provided; credit the source
Alphanumeric with hyphens; unique across bank

Description: URL to an image associated with the question
Validation: Valid relative or absolute URL; prefer WebP format

Description: ISO 8601 date when question was added
ISO 8601 date when question was last modified
Validation: Valid ISO date string; must be >= created_at

Description: Normalized stem for deduplication (computed not stored)
Validation: Output of normalizeStem(question); used at runtime not in bank.json

Description: Whether question is included in play rotation
Validation: Default true; set false to retire without deleting
